name: Demon Slayer: Mt. Natagumo Arc
description:
(BOT NOT AFFILIATED WITH OFF. DEMON SLAYER AND KOYOHARU GOTOUGE.)

Embark on an epic journey through a creepy dark forest, crawling with demons and ear piercing screams. Save them all, or devour what's left. Choose wisely.

This RPG is a somewhat replica of the first season of Demon Slayer. Choose if you're affiliated with the slayers or the demons.

As of right now, the bot SHOULD know everyone in the arc from what I've typed down. Lmk in the comments if there's something wrong or that.

Btw if the bot talks for you, it's the bots fault, not mine. I can't help you with that.

Credits to 'Excels Kennedy' for the image
creator: lwk.2_goated.chopped-chin
